name: Is a neck injury from slipping at work covered like a back injury?
description: Yes, treated similarly if proven work-related.[3][4]

mainEntity.name: Is a neck injury from slipping at work covered like a back injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, treated similarly if proven work-related.[3][4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, both are compensable if work-related; neck often paired with shoulder in falls.[3] Key factors: (1) Prove employment nexus; (2) Idiopathic falls ok if floor worsened impact.[4] Similar treatment in claims. Expect parallel processes.
